events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember the day music changed forever? 45 years ago, MTV launched and played 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video. Did video truly kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on this day in 1994, becoming a landmark of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped their debut album 'Definitely Maybe'. An instant classic that defined a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began on this day in 1969, attracting over 400,000 people to a dairy farm in upstate New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the iconic Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that shaped a generation. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: 49 years since we lost the King. Remembering the incomparable Elvis Presley, whose music continues to inspire and entertain generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on this day in 1996. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Legendary Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years since the music world lost a true legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on hip-hop and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Remembering the revolutionary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: 56 years since the world lost the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on music is still felt today.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The one with THAT zebra crossing! 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as hard as ever.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: You know the drill. Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis anthem?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single in 1971
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on this day in the US in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its message of peace and unity.

events.title: First iPod announced in 2001
events.blurb: Apple first announced the revolutionary iPod on this day in 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the original iPod, changing how we listen to music forever. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the 1962 premiere of 'Dr. No', the very first Bond film.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years since Dr. No premiered and introduced the world to 007. What's your favourite Bond film or theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Imagine All The People
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the life and enduring legacy of John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: And Now For Something Completely Different
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the comedic genius, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British icon.
